summary: Comprehensive testing of Build Your Own Guided Meditation feature and Zen Garden sand color picker. All features working correctly. Backend: 11/11 tests passed. Frontend: All UI flows verified.
seed_data_creation: Created test custom meditations during backend testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Build Your Own Guided Meditation feature fully tested. 4-step wizard works: Step 1 (intention + 7 focus areas), Step 2 (name, duration, sound, color), Step 3 (AI generation with loading state), Step 4 (review/edit steps, save & play). All 4 meditation endpoints tested: generate-guided, save-custom, my-custom, delete. Zen Garden sand color picker has 8 colors working.

meditation_page.3_mode_tabs: ✓ Guided Meditations, Build Your Own, Timer Mode tabs present
meditation_page.guided_meditations: ✓ 6 built-in meditations with category filters (All, Relaxation, Compassion, Focus, Energy, Visualization, Sleep)
meditation_page.guided_session: ✓ Clicking meditation card opens immersive session with step text, timer, pause/end controls
meditation_page.timer_mode: ✓ Duration presets (5, 10, 20, 30, 60 min), ambient sounds (Silence, Rain, Ocean, Forest, Singing Bowls, Wind)

build_your_own.unauthenticated: ✓ Shows 'Sign in to build personalized guided meditations with AI' prompt
build_your_own.step1_intention: ✓ Intention textarea + 7 focus area buttons (Stress Relief, Deep Sleep, Mental Clarity, Healing, Gratitude, Confidence, Letting Go)
build_your_own.step2_settings: ✓ Name input, duration buttons (5, 8, 10, 15, 20 min), ambient sound options, 8 theme colors
build_your_own.step3_generating: ✓ Loading spinner with 'Crafting your personal meditation...' message
build_your_own.step4_review: ✓ Generated steps displayed, editable, with Play Now and Save & Play buttons
build_your_own.ai_generation: ✓ GPT-5.2 generates personalized meditation steps (tested with 5 min duration, got 6 steps)

zen_garden_sand_colors.color_picker: ✓ 8 color circles displayed (Amethyst, Ocean, Sunlight, Rose, Sapphire, Emerald, Moonlight, Ember)
zen_garden_sand_colors.color_selection: ✓ Clicking colors updates selection with visual feedback (border, glow, scale)
zen_garden_sand_colors.canvas: ✓ Sand drawing canvas present with Clear button

backend_apis_tested: POST /api/meditation/generate-guided - 401 without auth, 200 with auth (returns generated steps)
POST /api/meditation/save-custom - 401 without auth, 200 with auth (saves meditation)
GET /api/meditation/my-custom - 401 without auth, 200 with auth (returns user's meditations)
DELETE /api/meditation/custom/{id} - 401 without auth, 200 with auth (deletes meditation), 404 for nonexistent
